mapper.select:
SELECT a.APPLY_NO, a.PERSON_ID, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME, TO_CHAR(a.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(a.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, a.LEAVE_REASON, a.LEAVE_TYPE_NO, a.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, a.APPLY_LENGTH, GET_VAC_COUNT(a.PERSON_ID, a.CPNY_ID, TO_CHAR(a.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(a.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS ANNUAL_LEAVE_COUNT, TO_CHAR(a.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_DEPT_NAME(e.DEPTNO, #{lang}) AS DEPT_NAME, a.AFFIRM_FLAG, a.CREATED_BY, a.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(a.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, a.UPDATED_BY, a.UPDATED_IP, (SELECT LISTAGG(HE.EMPID || ' - ' || HE.LOCAL_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.AFFIRM_LEVEL) FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL S LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON S.AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE S.APPLY_NO = TO_CHAR(a.APPLY_NO) AND S.AFFIRM_LEVEL > 0) AS AFFIRM_STR FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB a LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON e.PERSON_ID = a.PERSON_ID WHERE a.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
AND UPPER(e.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND UPPER(e.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%'
AND a.LEAVE_FROM_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND a.LEAVE_FROM_TIME < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY a.CREATE_DATE DESC, e.EMPID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB ( APPLY_NO, PERSON_ID, APPLY_TIME, LEAVE_FROM_TIME, LEAVE_TO_TIME, LEAVE_REASON, LEAVE_TYPE_NO, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_LENGTH, AFFIRM_FLAG, CONFIRM_FLAG, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH(#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_date(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'21',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'CODE')), '14014306', 0, #{cpnyId}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB SET PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_TIME = SYSDATE, LEAVE_FROM_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_TO_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_REASON = #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE = #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_LENGTH = GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH(#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_date(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'21',#{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'CODE')), AFFIRM_FLAG = '14014306', ACTIVITY = 1, CONFIRM_FLAG = 0, CONFIRM_DATE = NULL, CONFIRM_BY = NULL, CONFIRM_IP = NULL, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_APPLY_RESULT WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
